scripts.build: npm run build --workspace=packages/shared && npm run build --workspace=packages/cdk-app && npm run build --workspace=packages/web-app
scripts.clean: npm run clean --workspace=packages/shared && npm run clean --workspace=packages/cdk-app && npm run clean --workspace=packages/web-app
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/cdk-app && npm run typecheck --workspace=packages/web-app
